summary: Tested 3 new features: (1) Recent tag auto-apply on card creation, (2) Photo backfill for new contacts via find-or-create-and-log, (3) Scheduler job to expire Recent tags older than 14 days. All 11 pytest tests passed (100%). Direct database verification confirmed photo backfill and tag expiry are working correctly.

direct_verification.recent_tag_auto_apply: VERIFIED - Creates 'Recent' tag in tags collection with color=#5856D6, system_tag=true
direct_verification.tag_timestamps_field: VERIFIED - Contact has tag_timestamps.Recent datetime field
direct_verification.photo_backfill: VERIFIED - When card exists for phone and new contact created via find-or-create-and-log, photo_path is backfilled
direct_verification.expire_recent_tags: VERIFIED - Function removes 'Recent' tag and unsets tag_timestamps.Recent for contacts older than 14 days
direct_verification.scheduler_job: VERIFIED - daily_recent_tag_expiry job runs at 4 AM UTC daily

1_recent_tag_auto_apply: POST /api/congrats/create with existing contact -> Recent tag added to contact
Response includes recent_tag_auto_applied: true when tag applied
Response includes tags_applied: ['Recent'] when tag applied
tag_timestamps.Recent field set to current datetime on contact
2_recent_tag_auto_create: Recent tag auto-created in tags collection if not exists
3_photo_backfill: POST /api/contacts/{user_id}/find-or-create-and-log with phone matching existing card
Photo backfilled from congrats_cards.photo_path to contacts.photo_path
4_scheduler_expire_tags: Scheduled to run daily at 4 AM UTC
Removes 'Recent' tag from contacts where tag_timestamps.Recent > 14 days

seed_data_creation: Multiple test cards and contacts created with 'TEST_' prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully working: (1) Recent tag auto-apply during card creation - applies to contact with tag_timestamps.Recent, (2) Photo backfill from cards to new contacts via find-or-create-and-log endpoint, (3) Scheduler job 'daily_recent_tag_expiry' runs at 4 AM UTC to remove Recent tags older than 14 days. Note: Photo backfill only works when phone format is digits-only for regex matching.
